name: O & J Transportation
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (njportal.com/dor/businessnamesearch) - no matching entity surfaced in public searches
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER name searches for 'O & J Transportation', 'O AND J TRANSPORTATION', 'O&J TRANSPORTATION' returned matches only in CA, FL, MN, MO — none in Passaic NJ. Address 43 Aycrigg Ave, Passaic appears to be shared with other small limo/transport operators in this dataset (e.g., 'Easy Limo Svc' rank 3452), suggesting a multi-tenant location or registered agent address. Not found in NJ DOE school bus contractor lists. Likely a small intrastate paratransit/livery operator; insufficient public footprint to confirm corporate registry data.
